data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Custom report builder' as part of the reporting needs. However, the evidence does not include any details or functionality related to a custom report builder, indicating a clear gap in meeting this requirement. The linked use case explicitly lists 'Custom report builder' as a need, but no supporting evidence is provided to confirm its existence or functionality.
gaps: No evidence of a 'Custom report builder' functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
